headline: Reflecting On Consumer Discretionary - Footwear Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Deckers (NYSE:DECK)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Deckers (NYSE:DECK) and the rest of the consumer discretionary - footwear stocks fared in Q1.
